prevalence.trend: stable; diagnosis limited by testing access

vulnerablePopulations: patients with limited access to genetic counseling
epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Clinical syndrome with confirmatory genetic testing where available; multidisciplinary evaluation

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Not curable; symptom management limited by specialist access

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Genetic testing concentrated in tertiary centers; many families remain undiagnosed
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Symptomatic management and caregiver support; psychiatric care for comorbid symptoms
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Limited neurogenetics and long-term care support
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Growing tertiary neurology services and expanding genetic testing capacity
